plugins.name: new-project
plugins.description: Scaffold a new project with GitHub repo, CLAUDE.md, and bash shortcut

plugins.name: post-init
plugins.description: Strip project initialization sections from CLAUDE.md after setup is complete

plugins.name: go-review
plugins.description: Review Go codebase as a senior software architect

plugins.name: cicd-aws
plugins.description: Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD that deploys a Docker Compose app to EC2 via SSH, with ALB + Cloudflare DNS + SG wiring

plugins.name: branching
plugins.description: Lock the repo to a hardgated branch+PR workflow — ensure stable & main branches, set stable as default, restrict CI/CD to main, and write the policy into CLAUDE.md
